description: DMCA report API endpoints with evidence upload and status tracking
steps: Add DmcaReport entity (if not already from migration stories) with fields: reporter_id, content_id, original_url, description, evidence_urls, status (pending/reviewing/taken_down/rejected)
Add POST /dmca/report endpoint for creating reports with evidence
Add GET /dmca/:id endpoint for report details
Add POST /dmca/:id/review admin endpoint (approve takedown / reject)
Takedown sets Content.Status to TakenDown, soft-deletes storage object

description: DMCA review queue in ACP admin panel
steps: Create [locale]/dmca/page.tsx in ACP app listing pending DMCA reports
Create [locale]/dmca/[id]/page.tsx with report detail, evidence viewer, approve/reject actions
